pjon_sbb_begin.message0: PJON SoftwareBitBang bus %1 device id %2 pin %3
pjon_sbb_begin.tooltip: Create a PJON SoftwareBitBang bus and add update/receive polling to loop.

pjon_sbb_send_repeated_text.message0: PJON bus %1 send repeated text %2 to device %3 every %4 us

pjon_sbb_reply_text.tooltip: Reply to the sender from inside a receive callback.

pjon_sbb_on_receive.message0: when PJON bus %1 receives first byte variable %2 length variable %3
